meta.title: Discover your character — Saga for creators
meta.description: Ebook to define your visual identity and intentional content. Stop posting without direction.

hero.headline: Build your identity and become the protagonist of your content
hero.subhead: Stop creating without direction and start building content with intention and clarity. Give people a reason to remember you.

problem.title: When you post without a clear identity, effort doesn’t turn into outcomes

cards.title: You feel you don’t have enough followers
cards.body: Reach matters, but often the real issue is a message that doesn’t stand out.

cards.title: You don’t know what to post
cards.body: You spend hours scrolling for inspiration — you get overwhelmed, never land on a clear idea, and time slips away.

cards.title: Everything feels saturated
cards.body: Different trends with no clear goal and your feed turns into a patchwork. Comparison freezes you and your content loses personality.

cards.title: You’re unsure this is for you
cards.body: You want clarity without expensive courses or wasting hours on generic tutorials chasing a magic formula for what to post.

solution.title: What you’ll achieve with this ebook
solution.giftHint: Includes tactical bonuses to ship faster.

outcomes.title: Break limiting beliefs
outcomes.body: See the strategic mistakes keeping you stuck and how to exit autopilot.

outcomes.title: Define visual identity with intent
outcomes.body: Clear steps so your content looks coherent and recognizable.

outcomes.title: Content structures + retention
outcomes.body: Mental templates so every piece has a goal and direction.

outcomes.title: A realistic monetization mindset
outcomes.body: From improvisation to a system you can repeat without relying only on "motivation".

solution.imageAlt: Isabella — method applied in real content

proof.headline: This system didn’t come from theory — it came from years of real content.
proof.intro: Before teaching it, I lived it: mistakes, pivots, and a method that finally organized my message and results.

bullets: Copying trends without my own narrative

hero.statement: Move from improvising to a clear identity system: ebook + resources you can execute with this week.

bonuses.outcomeBenefit: A weekly template so every piece has intent, tone, and a slot on your calendar.

bonuses.painHeadline: You freeze in front of the camera
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: 30–50 prompts to start in minutes without relying only on trends.
A moodboard guide to align palette, type, and references with your voice.
A simple, realistic routine to publish with focus without burning out.

urgency.title: Why it helps to decide now
bullets: Launch window: the bundle is built for creators who want identity + content clarity now—not “someday.”
No fake scarcity: we don’t invent stock counts; the real cost is your time if clarity keeps waiting.
urgency.deadlineLineTemplate: For this edition, launch bonuses apply through {date}.

offer.ctaPrimary: I want my ebook access now

items.a: It’s a digital product (PDF or the format defined by the purchase platform). You’ll get download instructions after payment.

items.q: Where do I buy and how do I get access?
items.a: Checkout runs on the external platform configured for this launch (e.g. Hotmart). After paying, follow that platform’s instructions to access your purchase.

items.q: Does it work if I have a small audience?
items.a: Yes — the focus is identity clarity and content structure; that helps even with small audiences.
Refund policy depends on the payment platform and applicable terms. Review it on the checkout page before buying.

items.q: Can I get help with my purchase?
items.a: Yes—purchase support is handled by the payment platform (e.g. Hotmart) from its checkout or help center.

close.headline: Your personal brand needs direction — not more lost hours scrolling.
close.body: If you’re ready to move from improvisation to a repeatable system, this ebook is written for you.
close.footnote: It’s not magic: focus + structure + action.
